project.name: OceanPulse
project.description: Ocean monitoring buoy system with TDS sensing, relay control, and LoRa communication

phases.name: Prototype Validation
objectives: Validate TDS Sensor and Relay control via Arduino Mega
Establish reliable Serial bridge between Mega and Pi
Connect Pis to Megas and LoRa modules
Build Web Dashboard to monitor/control the unit

phases.name: Field Deployment
objectives: Deploy buoy in real marine environment
